experience.description: Bridging the gap between cutting-edge design and engineering to deliver immersive brand experiences.
Led the frontend team to build highly interactive, high-performance web applications using Next.js.
Designed award-winning websites and mobile applications with a focus on dark-mode aesthetics.

faq.question: What is your typical process?
faq.answer: I start with research and wireframing, followed by high-fidelity design, and finally development with performance optimization.

faq.question: Do you work with startups?
faq.answer: Yes! I love working with innovative startups to bring their vision to life.
